name: rebaptize
title: Rebaptize
description: Give your files a new name. Bulk rename, smart episode organizing, sort by date or GPS location
author: miguelcaetanodias

commands.name: rebaptize
commands.title: Rebaptize Files
commands.description: Bulk rename files using presets for TV shows, anime, movies, sequential, date, or find & replace

commands.name: smart-organize
commands.title: Smart Organize Episodes
commands.description: Auto-detect episode numbers and organize into season folders with proper naming

commands.name: sort-by-date
commands.title: Sort Files by Date
commands.description: Organize files into folders by creation date (day, month, or year)

commands.name: sort-by-location
commands.title: Sort Photos by Location
commands.description: Organize photos into folders based on GPS location data from EXIF metadata

commands.name: smart-find-replace
commands.title: Smart Find & Replace
commands.description: Find and replace patterns in filenames with multi-rule support, regex capture groups, and file filters

commands.name: preset-tv-show
commands.title: Rename as TV Show
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files into TV show format (Show Name S01E01)

commands.name: preset-anime
commands.title: Rename as Anime
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files into anime fansub format ([Group] Name - 01 [Quality])

commands.name: preset-movie
commands.title: Rename as Movie
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files into movie format (Name Year Quality)

commands.name: preset-sequential
commands.title: Rename Sequentially
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files with a prefix and sequential number (Prefix-001)

commands.name: preset-date-based
commands.title: Rename by Date
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Rename files using their creation date

commands.name: preset-change-case
commands.title: Change Filename Case
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Convert filenames to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, or Sentence case

commands.name: preset-swap-delimiter
commands.title: Swap Filename Delimiter
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Replace dots, underscores, dashes, or any delimiter in filenames with another

commands.name: preset-auto-enumerate
commands.title: Auto Enumerate Files
commands.subtitle: Rebaptize
commands.description: Number files sequentially, optionally sorted by creation or modification date

preferences.name: tvdbApiKey
preferences.title: TheTVDB API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Get a free API key at thetvdb.com to enable automatic season/episode lookup for Smart Organize Episodes.
